zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas d'Anvers III於1335年出生在英國爾阿普爾頓時，他的父親Thomas d'Anvers II40歲，母親Margaret de Tabley39歲。他於1347年與Isabel de Baguley在英國爾阿普爾頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1352年6月24日在英國英格蘭爾黑阿德爾享年17歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾韓維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas d'Anvers III于1335年出生在英国爾阿普爾頓时，他的父亲Thomas d'Anvers II40岁，母亲Margaret de Tabley39岁。他于1347年与Isabel de Baguley在英国爾阿普爾頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1352年6月24日在英国英格兰爾黑阿德爾享年17岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾韓維爾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Anvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas d'Anvers III was born in 1335, in Appleton, Cheshire, England, his father, Thomas d'Anvers II, was 40 and his mother, Margaret de Tabley, was 39. He married Isabel de Baguley in 1347, in Appleton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 24 June 1352, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 17, and was buried in Hanwell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas d'Anvers III est né en 1335, à Appleton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas d'Anvers II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Tabley, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Baguley en 1347, à Appleton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1352, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 17 ans, et a été enterré à Hanwell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas d'Anvers III 1335 in Appleton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas d'Anvers II 40 und seine Mutter Margaret de Tabley 39. Er hat 1347 in Appleton, Cheshire, England Isabel de Baguley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Juni 1352 im Alter von 17 Jahren in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hanwell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas d'Anvers III è nato il nel 1335 nel Appleton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas d'Anvers II, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Tabley, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Baguley nel 1347, nel Appleton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 giugno 1352, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 17 anni, e fu sepolto a Hanwell, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas d'Anvers IIIが1335年にイギリスチェシュアイアアップレトンで生まれた時，父Thomas d'Anvers IIは40歳，母Margaret de Tableyは39歳であった。1347年にイギリスチェシュアイアアップレトンでIsabel de Baguleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1352年6月24日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルで17歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアハンウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas d'Anvers III(이)가 1335년 영국 체실르 애플턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas d'Anvers II(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Tabley(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1347년 영국 체실르 애플턴에서 Isabel de Baguley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1352년 6월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체아들일에서 17세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 핸웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas d'Anvers III nasceu em 1335, em Appleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas d'Anvers II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Tabley, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Baguley em 1347, em Appleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1352, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 17 anos, e foi sepultado em Hanwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas d'Anvers III родился в 1335 г. в местности эпплетон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas d'Anvers II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Tabley, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Baguley в 1347 г. в местности эпплетон, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 июня 1352 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 17 лет и был похоронен в местности ханвелл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas d'Anvers III nació en 1335, en Appleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas d'Anvers II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret de Tabley, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Isabel de Baguley en 1347, en Appleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de junio de 1352, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 17 años, y fue sepultado en Hanwell, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
